subject: Public Health
title: Anti-Vaccination Movements
description: A fast breakdown of Anti-Vaccination Movements for builders.

hook.text: Anti-vaccination movements are as old as vaccines themselves—opposition began within years of Jenner's discovery.

buildup.text: Religious objections, bodily autonomy arguments, and distrust of government fuel organized resistance.

discovery.text: Social media amplifies anti-vaccine messages—algorithms promote emotional, fear-based content over science.

twist.text: Many anti-vaccine influencers profit financially—selling alternative remedies and subscription content.

climax.text: Combating movements requires understanding motivations, not just correcting misinformation.

punchline.text: Fear spreads faster than facts. Countering it takes empathy, not just evidence.

quiz.question: What amplifies anti-vaccine messages most effectively today?
options: Social media algorithms promoting emotional content
